notes.note: L. Cincius, the man of business who handled affairs between Cicero and Atticus; here he brings word, before dawn, that Atticus has reached Italy and is sending slaves ahead.

notes.anchor: the third day before the Kalends of February
notes.note: The Roman inclusive-counting date formula: the third day before the Kalends (the first) of February, i.e. 30 January. Days were reckoned backwards from the Kalends, Nones, and Ides, counting both endpoints.
